app.subtitle: Unconscious pattern analysis
app.name: Ozero's Mirror
app.line1: No consolation — just an accurate reflection.
app.line2: Keep only the facts. The problem is usually smaller than the story.
app.tagline: Training to separate fact from delusion in your own record.
app.scene1: Some days, a thought that rose once carries on into the night.
app.scene2: Some days, it feels like the same thing happened again.

measure.guide0:
Write the one scene that comes to mind first, right now.
It can be from yesterday or from ten years ago.
measure.guide1:
No need to write well.
It doesn't have to be sentences.
measure.guide2:
Write whatever comes up, honestly and boldly.
Swearing is fine. Don't mind the spelling.
measure.guide3:
Don't edit, don't censor —
pour it out.
measure.guide4: There is no right or wrong writing.
measure.factsEmpty: Write at least one line in the facts box.
measure.factsTitle: Now, sort out only the facts, feelings, and actions.
measure.factDef:
The test for a fact:
What a camera and a recorder would capture
What can be stated with specific names and numbers
What 1,000 people would all state the same way
measure.delusionDef:
A delusion is what gets layered on top — judgment, evaluation, guess, opinion, imagination.
A delusion is neither good nor bad.
It is simply an indicator of how
you interpret the world.
measure.example1:
Example)
"I can't buy it because I have no money" is a delusion.
The fact is "My wallet has 0 dollars in it."
measure.example2:
"I stayed at a nice hotel" is a delusion.
The fact is "I stayed at the Ritz-Carlton."
'Nice' is an adjective you added.
measure.feelingsHelp:
Write what rose in your body or mind in that moment.
Chest tightening, face flushing.
Feelings are never right or wrong.
measure.actionsHelp:
Write what you actually did and how you reacted.
What you said, how you moved.
(Doing nothing is also an action.)
measure.toMirror: Hold it up to the mirror
measure.resultTitle: The mirror looked at your facts box.
measure.clean: Every sentence here would be caught on camera.
measure.unclear: Which side would you place this on?
measure.mirrorRatio: The mirror splits it as fact {f} : delusion {d}.
measure.limit: That's all for today. You can mirror again tomorrow.
measure.recallNoAnswer: Yesterday's question was left unanswered. On to today's record.

save.ladder: Today's is a single photograph. When twenty-one pile up from the same spot, the sentence that returns shows itself even as the events change.
save.prompt: This question does not end here.
save.hint: Get an Ozero ID — tomorrow, at the time you choose, today's answer comes back with the mirror's reading of it. Keep three days and the mirror reflects what repeats. No address, no password.
save.existing: I already have an Ozero ID
save.doneTime: Tomorrow at {t}, today's answer comes back with its mirror.
save.savedToday: Today's mirror is kept. Tomorrow your answer comes back with its mirror.
save.codeInvalid: That ID format is not right. Example: o023
save.codeTaken: That ID is already registered. If you're new, get a fresh ID.
save.failed: Could not save. Please try again.

me.title: My mirror
me.none: You don't have an Ozero ID yet.
me.deliverAt: The mirror opens at {t} each day.
me.mirror3Sub: Only the interpretations that repeated, quoted verbatim.
me.courseDesc: The first week you split fact from delusion. The second, you find the sentence that returns across different events. The third, you place the start and now side by side. Once the repetition shows, a gap opens between an event and your response — the energy spent on rumination comes back. On day 21 you receive a report built only from your own sentences.
me.courseConsent: Participants' records are used to verify Ozero's effect. That consent is the condition of this price.
me.notifyOnDone: Evening notification is on. This device will be notified at {t} each day.
me.notifyIos: On iPhone: Safari share button → 'Add to Home Screen' first, then turn this on.
me.notifyUnsupported: This browser does not support notifications.
me.notifyDenied: Notifications are blocked. Please allow them in browser settings.
me.notifyFailed: Could not turn on notifications. Please try again.

today.building: Today's dial — built in the next step.

loop.saveFailed: Could not save. Please try again.
loop.noYesterday: Yesterday has no record. What kind of day was the unwritten one?
loop.scalesIntro: Leave today's you in four dials. These become a trend that returns to you.
loop.scaleMood: The mood underneath today — 0 very low · 10 very good
loop.scaleEmotion: The biggest emotion today — name and intensity (0 barely · 10 very strong)
loop.scaleEnergy: The energy left in your body — 0 drained · 10 full
loop.scaleSleep: Last night's sleep — 0 very bad · 10 very good
loop.privacyLine: There is no right or wrong writing. This record is never shown to other observers.
loop.splitGuide: Place each piece. Fact = what a camera and recorder would capture. Delusion = everything the mind layered on top. An emotion arising is a fact; its interpretation is a delusion.
loop.toMirror: Hold it up to the mirror
loop.contrastGuide: You sorted it this way. It also divides like this.
loop.contrastFailed: Could not load the mirror. Moving on without the contrast today.
loop.linksGuide: Tap a delusion piece, then tap the emotion dial it connects to. You do the connecting. Not connecting is fine too.
loop.fallbackQuestion: Which sentence from today's record stays with you the longest?
loop.shareToggle: Show this answer anonymously to other observers (this answer only)
loop.actionGuide: Set one small action for tomorrow.
loop.reminderToggle: Get a daytime reminder for this action
loop.courseDone3: Three days of records are done. If three days show this much, twenty-one days become a map of what repeats.
loop.courseDone21: Twenty-one days of records are done. Your report is ready.
loop.crisisLine: There is a place to talk — suicide prevention line 109 (24 hours)
loop.day0Intro: Before your first record, leave the you of now. The you of day 21 will look at this again. Answer for the past two weeks.
loop.day0Scale: 0 at no time · 5 all of the time
loop.peersShared: One anonymous answer from the same day
loop.day0Self: What kind of person do you think you are, right now?
loop.stage1: Days 1–7 · splitting today's sentences into fact and delusion
loop.stage2: Days 8–14 · finding the sentence that returns across different events
loop.stage3: Days 15–21 · placing the start and now side by side

course.reviewsLabel: From participants of the Ozero Question Letter — the original of this same 21-day training.
course.review1: Before: I poured hours of energy into chewing over interpretations. After: I watch from a little distance now — it clearly takes less energy.
course.review2: Now, after all those things happen, a gap is forming where I think, even briefly, about what to choose next.
course.needId: The 21-day course needs an Ozero ID. Get one through a measurement first.
course.agreeFirst: Please check the verification consent — that consent is the condition of this price.
course.tossNotReady: The payment window is still loading. Please try again in a moment.
course.testMode: This is a test payment — no real money moves.
course.doneSub: The day you leave your first record becomes day 1.

report.title: The 21-day report
report.day21Intro: Before placing it next to your starting point, leave the you of now. Answer for the past two weeks.
report.recorded: Days recorded: {n}. Days without a record: {miss}.
report.linksTitle: The delusions and emotions you connected
report.scalesHelp: Left to right is day 1 to 21; bottom to top is 0 to 10. The number above each dot is that day's score; gaps are days without a record. Find the days it swung, then read them next to what you wrote that day.
report.scaleDaysHelp: A number reads only next to what you wrote that day. The days your mood dial was lowest and highest, in your own words.
report.emotionHelp: How many times you picked that name in the emotion dial over 21 days.
report.repeatsHelp: Different events, same interpretation — how many separate days it appeared. If the sentence stays while the events change, the sentence came from you, not the events.
report.day21Q1: What changed the most over these 21 days?
report.day21Q2: What kind of person do you think you are now?
report.selfTitle: Your sentence at the start, and at day 21
report.selfHelp: Your answers to the same question — quoted as written, simply placed side by side.
report.selfNoStart: No answer remains from the start.
report.returnsHelp: Actions recorded on several days where you came back to the body or the present. Quoted as you wrote them.
report.nextDoor1: This is as far as the mirror goes — showing you the repetition in your own words.
report.nextDoor2: Where that sentence began is the work of the next layer.
report.nextDoor3: Unconscious Deep Course 35 — thirty-five days led directly by the operator. Details will appear here when enrollment opens.

email.linkHint: Even if you switch devices or clear your browser, this address can recover your ID. Used for recovery only.
email.sent: Confirmation email sent. Tap the link in your inbox.
email.mailUnavailable: The mail sender is not connected yet. Once it is, you can link right here.
email.taken: This email is already linked to another ID.
email.bad: That email format is not right.
email.failed: Could not send. Please try again.
email.confirmDone: Email linked. You can now recover your ID on any device.
email.confirmBad: The link is expired or invalid. Request a new one from My mirror.
email.recoverHint: Enter the email you linked and we will send a recovery link.
email.recoverSent: Email sent. If that address is registered, a link is on its way.
email.pasteHint: On a device where the emailed link won't open (like an iPhone home-screen app), paste your recovery code here.

settings.researchLabel: I agree that my records, anonymized, may be used for Ozero's pattern research and effect verification. I can withdraw at any time.
settings.crisis: There is a place to talk — suicide prevention line 109 (24 hours)
settings.deleteWarn: All records will be permanently erased and cannot be recovered. Shared answers disappear too.
settings.deleteMismatch: The phrase does not match. Type it exactly.
